rulings.Case Title: STEVEN GOODMAN VS. THOMAS MCDONALD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Application For Determination Regarding Existence Of Procedural Deficiency
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JUNE 8, 2007, LINE 23. DEFENDANT OCEAN PARC VILLAGE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Application For Determination Regarding Existence Of Procedural Deficiency: OCEAN PARC'S REQUEST TO DETERMINE "PROCEDURAL REQUIREMENT" IS NOT IN THE PROPER FORM OF A MOTION TO STRIKE AND COURT WILL NOT ADDRESS IT. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS HAVE BEEN RULED UPON. =(302/PJM/CK)

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN GOODMAN VS. THOMAS MCDONALD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, JUNE 8, 2007, LINE 23. PLAINTIFF'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. 1.) THE ISSUE OF THE PERMIT IS A DISCRETIONARY ACT AND THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT THE ISSUANCE WAS SUBJECT TO ANY CONDITION BINDING ON THE CITY. 2.) THE EASEMENT IS PART OF THE COMMON AREA AND NO VOTE WAS NECESSARY. 3.) EQUITABLE FACTORS WEIGH AGAINST ISSUANCE OF THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION: PLAINTIFF DELAYED IN FILING SUIT. PLAINTIFF DID NOT SEEK TO ENGAGE IN A.D.R. PLAINTIFF HAS KNOWN OF THE PROSPECT OF CONSTRUCTION FROM THE TIME THE SETTLEMENT WAS ENTERED INTO. CONSTRUCTION IS UNDERWAY AND McDONALD WOULD INCUR SUBSTANTIAL COSTS IF DELAYED. STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS MAY BAR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. =(302/PJM/CK)
